about.title: About Sevastopol Apartments
about.desc: Three carefully maintained apartments in Varna, Bulgaria — just minutes from the beach and the Sea Garden park. We've been welcoming guests since 2018 and take pride in clean, comfortable, well-equipped stays.

cleanliness.title: Cleanliness
cleanliness.desc: Every apartment professionally cleaned before each stay.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.desc: Quality bedding, fully equipped kitchens, reliable Wi-Fi.

personal.title: Personal Touch
personal.desc: The owner answers messages personally — usually within 1 hour.

location.title: Great Location
location.desc: Steps from the beach, Sea Garden, and city centre.

areaGuide.title: Varna Area Guide
areaGuide.desc: Everything you need to know to make the most of your stay in Varna.
areaGuide.intro: Everything worth seeing is within easy reach of the apartments. Here is what we recommend to our guests.
areaGuide.gettingAroundDesc: The apartments sit in central Varna — most sights below are walkable. Taxis are inexpensive (order via TaxiMe or Yellow Taxi apps), buses run frequently, and Varna Airport is about 20 minutes away (7 km).

spots.title: Varna Beach
spots.desc: The city's long sandy beach with beach bars and swimming from May to October.

spots.title: Sea Garden
spots.desc: Varna's vast seaside park — perfect for morning runs, sunsets, and the summer open-air stages.

spots.title: City Centre & Boulevard
spots.desc: Pedestrian boulevards with shops, cafés and restaurants around Nezavisimost Square.

spots.title: Roman Baths
spots.desc: The largest ancient Roman bath complex on the Balkan peninsula, right in the old town.

spots.title: Archaeological Museum
spots.desc: Home of the oldest processed gold in the world — the Varna Necropolis treasure.

spots.title: Port & Marina
spots.desc: Seafront promenade with fish restaurants and boat trips along the coast.

spots.title: Aladzha Monastery
spots.desc: A medieval cave monastery carved into a limestone cliff, surrounded by forest.

spots.title: Golden Sands
spots.desc: Bulgaria's famous resort beach with water sports and nightlife.

footer.madeWith: Made with care in Varna, Bulgaria
footer.blurb: 3 private apartments in Varna, Bulgaria — steps from the Black Sea beach and the Sea Garden park. Book direct and save 10%.

sections.p: These terms govern bookings of the Sevastopol Apartments in Varna, Bulgaria, made through this website. By completing a booking you accept these terms.

All prices are shown in EUR and include the direct-booking discount where indicated. The total price, including cleaning fee and tourist tax, is shown before you pay. Instant bookings are confirmed immediately after successful payment via Stripe; booking requests are confirmed by the owner within 24 hours, after which you receive a payment link.

Cancellation is free up to 7 days before check-in. Cancellations within 7 days of check-in are non-refundable. If a cross-platform calendar conflict makes your stay impossible, you will be fully refunded immediately.

Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 11:00. No smoking indoors, no pets, no parties or events. The number of guests must not exceed the maximum stated for the apartment. Custom check-in times can be arranged with the owner.
Guests are responsible for the apartment during their stay and may be charged for damage beyond normal wear and tear.
We are liable under Bulgarian consumer law. We are not liable for events outside our reasonable control (force majeure) or for personal belongings left in the apartment.
Bulgarian law applies. Consumers may also use the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. Nothing in these terms limits your statutory consumer rights.
Sevastopol Apartments, Varna, Bulgaria · 5areood@gmail.com · +359 89 436 2230.
Sevastopol Apartments, Varna, Bulgaria, operates this website and is the controller of your personal data. For any privacy matter, contact us at 5areood@gmail.com.

When you book, we collect your name, email address, phone number, country, stay dates, number of guests and any special requests. When you use the contact form, we collect your name, email address and message. Card payments are processed by Stripe — we never see or store your full card details. We also keep basic technical logs (IP address, browser type) for security.

We process booking data to perform the accommodation contract with you (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), to comply with Bulgarian tax, accounting and guest-registration obligations (Art. 6(1)(c)), and for our legitimate interest in preventing fraud and keeping the website secure (Art. 6(1)(f)). Marketing messages are sent only with your consent (Art. 6(1)(a)).

We use trusted service providers to run the site: Vercel (hosting), Supabase (database), Stripe (payments), Resend (transactional email) and Upstash (security rate-limiting). They process data on our behalf under data-processing agreements. Where required by law, guest data may be reported to Bulgarian authorities (e.g. guest registration and tourist tax).
Some providers may process data outside the EEA (for example in the USA). Such transfers are protected by the EU–US Data Privacy Framework or Standard Contractual Clauses.

Booking and invoicing data is kept for as long as Bulgarian tax and accommodation law requires (generally up to 10 years). Contact-form messages are deleted within 12 months. Security logs are kept only for a short period.

You have the right to access, correct, delete and receive a copy of your data, to restrict or object to its processing, and to withdraw consent at any time. Email 5areood@gmail.com to exercise these rights. You may also lodge a complaint with the Bulgarian Commission for Personal Data Protection (cpdp.bg) or your local supervisory authority.
See our Cookie Policy for details of the cookies and local storage this site uses.
Cookies are small text files stored on your device. This site keeps them to a minimum.

Strictly necessary only: your language preference (NEXT_LOCALE cookie), your light/dark theme choice and your cookie-consent choice (browser local storage). During checkout, Stripe sets cookies needed for secure, fraud-free payment processing.
We currently use no analytics or marketing cookies. If this changes, we will ask for your consent first via the cookie banner.
You can delete or block cookies in your browser settings at any time. Blocking strictly necessary cookies may affect language selection and checkout.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.desc: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site usage.
